summary:
- publisher=UKMTO, title=Advisories - 2026, directness=high, why=Primary source for official maritime advisories including Strait of Hormuz traffic alerts; contains archived and upcoming advisories for April–May 2026, critical for forecasting vessel movements, next=https://www.ukmto.org/ukmto-products/advisories/2026  
- publisher=UKMTO, title=UKMTO Products, directness=medium, why=Navigation hub to access Advisories, Warnings, and Monthly Reports; confirms advisories are published under “UKMTO Products > Advisories”, next=https://www.ukmto.org/ukmto-products  
- publisher=UKMTO, title=Initial Report, directness=high, why=Specifies mandatory vessel reporting fields (IMO, position, course, ETA) required for traffic monitoring in high-risk areas like Strait of Hormuz; directly supports verification of vessel-day data claims, next=https://www.ukmto.org/reporting-formats/initial-report  
- publisher=UKMTO, title=Recent Incidents, directness=low, why=Shows 0 reports as of 2026-05-05, but no filter or date range allows confirmation of April–May 2026 activity; potential lead for cross-checking incident trends, next=https://www.ukmto.org/recent-incidents?gsid=48d941da-af5a-48a4-8ec1-4f54283e2078  
- publisher=UKMTO, title=Warnings - 2024, directness=medium, why=Pattern shows annual warning archives; implies 2026 advisories will follow same structure, validating the 2026 advisories page as the correct future destination, next=https://www.ukmto.org/ukmto-products/warnings/2024
